name: Doppio and Diavolo
description:
🩷⏳🌓 | “No one can escape the fate that was chosen for them. All that remains is the end, where you will perish. Eternal greatness exists only within myself”

New update has been done to lower tokens and free out this bot’s memory usage as well as hopefully have better replies when it comes to Diavolo switching out. He SHOULD be more likely to appear if not anywhere too public but we will see. I also fixed grammatical errors in the description so I hope replies also make more sense. Added example dialogues too. Let me know how the changes are yippie!

—Scenario— Doppio is having a “call” with his Boss about needing to locate somewhere nearby as precaution and doesn’t get told much else, after hanging up and recollecting his thoughts he gets on the sidewalk to make his way over.

Ive noticed this bot has a tendency to talk for the {{user}} more than my others so far. If the bot starts responding for {{user}} try to combat it by rating responses that don’t do that and editing out their responses for {{user}}. I apologize for the inconvenience!

Tags: JJBA, Jojos bizarre adventure, part 5.
creator: Leozhere
